summary: Verified typography hierarchy and avatar blend on portfolio at all viewports (1920, 390). All 10 requested criteria pass.

critical_code_review_comments: avatar-blend ::after gradient uses --bg-base (#0C0C0E) which matches section bg — works well. Consider slightly earlier fade start (e.g., transparent 40%) for softer blend if user wants even more blur, but current 50%→100% meets 'no sharp edges' requirement.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All typography and avatar-blend criteria verified via computed styles + visual screenshots at desktop (1920) and mobile (390).
